subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Us unto him who hath quaffed the choice wine of utterance from the hand of the bounty of his Lord, the All-Merciful, and was of them that turned towards Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن شرب رحیق البیان من ید عنایه ربه الرحمن و کان من المقبلین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
